_schema.description: Flat dataset for proportional area (bubble) chart. Each item gets a circle whose AREA is proportional to its value. D3 pack layout positions and sizes circles automatically. The radius-error toggle demonstrates what happens when radius (not area) is used — a common and serious implementation mistake.

fields.title: string — chart headline
fields.items[].label: string — display label (keep concise for in-circle text)
fields.items[].short: string — abbreviated label for small circles
fields.items[].value: number — positive value; circle AREA will be proportional to this

_schema.replace: Swap items[] with your categories and values. Any count of items works; 5–12 is the practical readable range. Values must be positive. Relative ratios between values determine relative circle areas.

title: AI for Good Investment Commitments by Region
